contract.portfolio_day_definition: unique UTC calendar dates touched by selected half-open window intervals; overlapping symbols count once
contract.log_growth_definition: sum of ln(equity_after/equity_before) over completed trade rows from the chronological shared-equity ledger, divided by unique portfolio operating dates
contract.equity_ledger_basis: one chronological shared equity and shared occupied_until across all selected BTC/ETH contexts; fees and slippage included
contract.portfolio_scope_note: window-reset ledgers remain only as panel diagnostics and do not supply the primary portfolio metrics
contract.subset_drawdown_note: environment and source-strategy subsets are not standalone equity paths, so their max_drawdown_fraction is null
